description:
Idle Loops is an incremental game with light optimisation elements.
You're stuck in a time loop and explore the world around you,
getting a little bit stronger and doing a little more each loop.

0.4.1.description:
# Idle Loops AP 0.4.1

## APWorld
* Fixed generation issues
* Added "Progressive Lootable" filler item (with option to disable) to smooth out unlucky starts/seeds
* Added 2 Rep + 10 Short Quests to Z1 logic
    * _I first added Progressive Lootables, then still had an abysmally unlucky test seed where I had basically nothing after doing all low-mana checks, so both these lines are attempts to solve the same issue. I'm not happy though, forcing 10 Short Quests feels a bit heavy handed._
* Removed "Hard Logic" option for now, turns out the one use case I had for it was patched on the new fork, oops.

## Client
* Supports above changes
* Fixed a few places where internal action names are displayed instead of the more readable ones
    * _i.e. "SQuests" > "Short Quest" and such_

## Idle Loops AP 0.4.1.1
_(The only download below, I removed the 0.4.1 one)_

## APWorld
* Fixed Buy Mana not being in Sphere 0 for Z1 goal
* Removed Meet People/Investigate from Sphere 0 for Z2+ goal, the 10 Short Quests in Z1 logic should cover the hole I wanted with that

## Client
* Stopped scouting Progress bars/Lootable actions from sending a hint
* Fixed the predictor not taking Starting Gold/Mana filler items into account until the first action in the list is changed after connecting
